subcodes.first_line: O disciple of that noble personage! Your detailed letter was perused. Time for a lengthy reply is lacking, so with utmost brevity [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای تلمیذ ان شخص جلیل نامه مفصل شما ملاحظه گردید فرصت جواب مفصل ندارم در غایت اختصار
subcodes.subjects: @consultation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters, @House of Justice, @non-participation in politics
